title: Unstable Timepiece
description: A strange artifact that lets you manipulate your own time field, slow down time to reduce damage taken or speed it up to go fast!
body:
# Unstable Timepiece

[![](https://i.imgur.com/UoIBayo.png)](https://modfest.net/1.21)

A strange artifact that lets you manipulate your own time field, slow down time to reduce damage taken or speed it up to go fast!

## Crafting & Usage

You can craft an Unstable Timepiece with 4 echo shards and a nether star.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Xt9hp0ch/images/cbbd298ec10b45a6775dbe6a575a40e0e6b1b5ec.png)

You can change your flow of time by using the item.

### Fast Mode

- 🟢 +100% Move Speed
- 🟢 +50% Attack Speed
- 🔴 +50% Damage Taken
- 🔴 +50% Exhaustion
- ⚪ -50% Effect Duration

### Slow Mode

- 🟢 -50% Damage Taken
- 🟢 +100% Jump Height
- 🟢 -50% Exhaustion
- 🔴 -50% Move Speed
- 🔴 -50% Attack Speed
- ⚪ +100% Effect Duration
